materials: Needle and thread for sewing eyes, nose…

rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11, turn and crochet to the second chain from hook
rounds.summary: Create a foundation chain of 11 stitches.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.rawInstruction: 9sc, 4sc in the next st, 8sc, 3sc the the last st
rounds.summary: Work single crochets and increases around.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Work in front loop only with increases.
rounds.title: Round 3

rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 5

rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch for four rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 6-9

rounds.rawInstruction: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.
rounds.summary: Fasten off and secure yarn ends.
rounds.title: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.

rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11 and do the same with bottom case but R3 do not FLO.
rounds.summary: Create foundation chain and follow top case pattern without front loop only on round 3.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch for three rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 5-7

rounds.rawInstruction: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more and join with the bottom case on the next step.
rounds.summary: Work two additional single crochets and prepare to join.
rounds.title: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more and join with the bottom case on the next step.

rounds.rawInstruction: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
rounds.summary: Slip stitch the two halves together using front and back loops.
rounds.title: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.

rounds.rawInstruction: 7sc in MR,do not join, just tie MR
rounds.summary: Work seven single crochets in a magic ring and tie closed.
rounds.title: Ears

rounds.summary: Work five single crochets in a magic ring.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch for two rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 2-3

rounds.summary: Add two single crochets on each side.
rounds.title: Crochet on both side 2sc

rounds.rawInstruction: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
rounds.summary: Attach all components and facial features.
rounds.title: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
